src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/aspect/.general_idea: Removed imports for HttpServletResponse, Logger, and other unused classes to clean up the file.
Introduced a ThreadLocal variable to propagate user UUID context within the request thread.
Unified logging behavior to always save to MongoDB, removing the conditional check for non-production environments that previously logged to stdout.
src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/aspect/.human_impl: Removed `if (!env.equals("prod"))` blocks and the associated `logger.info` calls, ensuring `pool.submit` runs for all requests.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/aspect/.general_idea: Changed the default UUID value from 'unknown' to 'anonymous' to match the new ThreadLocal initialization.
src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/aspect/.human_impl: Changed `.setUuid((uuid == null || uuid.isEmpty()) ? "unknown" : uuid)` to `.setUuid((uuid == null || uuid.isEmpty()) ? "anonymous" : uuid)`.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/aspect/.general_idea: Stopped capturing and logging the HTTP response status code in the audit log.
src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/aspect/.human_impl: Removed code retrieving `HttpServletResponse` and setting `.setStatus(status)` on the LogDocument.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/aspect/.general_idea: Corrected the duration calculation to use integer division instead of floating-point, likely because the target field expects a long or integer.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/control.general_idea: Renamed the injected statistic service bean to follow standard Spring naming conventions (Service suffix).
src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/control.human_impl: Changed field from `Statistic statistic` to `StatisticService statisticService` and updated the import.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/control.general_idea: Replaced instance method call for bot status with a static access to a global configuration object.
Removed the endpoint for retrieving all release strategies as it is no longer needed or exposed.
src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/control.human_impl: Deleted the `@GetMapping("/release/strategy")` method and its implementation.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/control.general_idea: Removed the endpoint for retrieving the maximum history count, likely consolidating config retrieval.
Added a new endpoint to retrieve the entire system configuration object.
Renamed the Statistic service class to StatisticService to follow Spring naming conventions.
Removed the GET /min endpoint that returned the minimum submission count from system config.
Replace direct field access on sysConfig with a service method call to retrieve top submissions.
Update history date retrieval to use a nested service accessor and renamed constant.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/pojo/me.general_idea: Add an 'uploader' field to the Submission POJO to track the user who submitted the media.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/service.general_idea: Updated import statement to reflect the package rename of the Utils class from 'service' to 'util'.
Changed how the minimum submissions configuration is accessed, likely due to a refactoring of the SysConfig structure.
Adjusted the time window for enabling the bot, changing the start hour from 22 to 21.
Improved log messages to provide more context and clarity regarding bot enable/disable decisions and submission counts.
src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/service.human_impl: logger.info("bot should enable because of time: {}", currentHour);

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/service.general_idea: Replaced integer size comparison with the more idiomatic isEmpty() method for List.
Changed the shared configuration instance from an instance field to a static field to allow global access without dependency injection.
Expanded comments to clarify the idempotency of the initialization process in multi-instance environments.
src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/service.human_impl: 只有不存在的时候才会写入默认值，而且多个实例写入的默认值是一样的

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/service.general_idea: Added a detailed block comment explaining the logic for scanning and setting release strategies.
Removed the botStatus getter method, likely moving this logic to direct access or another service.
Removed the getTop getter method, simplifying the service interface.
Removed the getReleaseStrategy getter method.
Removed the getSelectedReleaseStrategy getter method.
Removed the getMinSubmissions getter method.
Removed the getMaxHistory getter method.
Added a getter for the entire Sys configuration object to replace the removed specific getters.
Updated import path to reflect the renaming of the Utils class package from 'Utils' to 'util'.
Update import statement to reflect the package rename from 'Utils' to 'util.Utils'.
Change access to configuration from a local variable 'config' to a static field on 'SysConfigService', likely due to a refactoring in how configuration is accessed globally.
Corrected the import path for the Utils class to match the new package structure.
Added logic to capture the current user's UUID from a thread-local context and set it as the uploader on the submission object.
Added import for the Audit aspect class to access the thread-local UUID storage.
Updated the import statement for the Utils class to reflect a package rename from 'Utils' to 'util.Utils'.
Update import statement to reflect the refactoring of the Utils class from the root package to a dedicated util subpackage.
Modify the local storage filename generation strategy to prefix the UUID with a timestamp to ensure chronological ordering of files.
